title: Packet 012 Through Packet 016 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 012 through Packet 016 Operations Visibility authority burst through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` host-mirror parity before any later browser-runtime comparison or next Operations Visibility slice depends on the new local authority set.
dependency_note: Packet 016 completed the remaining Node-only PM review validation slice. The next truthful move is a bounded publication and host-resync gate because the new Packet 012 through Packet 016 authority set is still local-only.
required_inputs: Current local authority files for Packet 012 through Packet 017 plus routing and roadmap updates
execution_scope: Stage only the Packet 012 through Packet 016 packet JSON files, their handoffs, the authored Packet 017 gate JSON and handoff, the routing handoff, and the roadmap update required to publish the current Operations Visibility authority burst.
Exclude unrelated `.vercelignore`, older Packet 039/057/062/095 drift, the Packet 006 operator prompt, and any unrelated source, package, lockfile, runtime, service, or old-clone changes.
Run JSON parse checks and `git diff --cached --check` before commit.
Commit and push only if the staged scope remains exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively only after publication succeeds.
success_criteria: The exact Packet 012 through Packet 016 authority burst plus the authored Packet 017 gate files are published to `origin/clean-main`.
`/home/olares/code/apex` reaches clean fast-forward parity at the published commit.
commit_message: Publish Olares PM review authority burst
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 017 published the bounded Packet 012 through Packet 016 Operations Visibility authority burst plus the authored Packet 017 gate in commit `28db1524a6fbf1b4de2c7da5e32898f9a85b15e3` with message `Publish Olares PM review authority burst`, pushed `origin/clean-main`, fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from `56a33d452397feb0e75b94aa5af81ba93ade9031` to clean parity at `28db1524a6fbf1b4de2c7da5e32898f9a85b15e3`, and preserved `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as observe-only at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count `17`.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 018 - Post-017 Host Browser Runtime Readiness Decision
next_action: Keep host browser-runtime execution closed until the post-publication browser-runtime readiness decision is recorded.
